ddt:Target.Name: N_PZ1A_DMC_CAN_FD_VC_20200902
ddt:Target.Description:
[4]Sep 2nd, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified CF items, based on Rev6.
[3]Nov 28th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Changed file name.
[2]Nov 26th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Added DM items, and changed communication protocol from DOC to CAN-FD
[1]Oct 25th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Modified DID from $1000 to $0100.
[N]Oct 16th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Initial Creation.

Item.Text: (TBD)AD/RPK OFF + TD or MRM in regulation(04h)
(TBD)AD2 L2 regulation + TD or MRM in regulation(05h)
(TBD)AD1 L3 regulation + TD or MRM in regulation(06h)
(TBD)RPK regulation + TD or MRM in regulation(07h)
(TBD)left flashing indicator ON and right flashing indicator OFF(01h)
(TBD)left flashing indicator OFF and right flashing indicator ON(02h)
(TBD)left flashing indicator ON and right flashing indicator ON(03h)
(TBD)Frozen in front direction _ head and eye(08h)
(TBD)Frozen in not front direction _ head and eye(10h)
[B2A51](TBD)Abnormal battery voltage detection circuit (invalid value detected)
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Device.Name: [B2A51](TBD)Abnormal battery voltage detection circuit (invalid value detected)
